chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 200 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.02.2018. FOR ORDERS ON STATEMENT. ------- None present for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for the respondents. Mr. Orangzeb Talpur, Asstt. Attorney General. ---- Learned counsel for the petitioner has already filed statement dated 6.2.2018 whereby he does not press this Constitutional Petition and requests for withdraw the same. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.
